data.title: Audit and fix existing ticket link references for hierarchy enforcement consistency
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Exemption
test-exempt: static assets only / non-executable instruction files (Rule 5 of behavioral testing standard). Verify commands check structural consistency.

## What
Audit all files referencing `ticket link` across the codebase for consistency with hierarchy enforcement behavior. Fix any references that imply unsupported relations or incorrectly describe `ticket link` behavior.

## Implementation Steps

1. Find all files referencing `ticket link` or `dso ticket link`:
   ```bash
   grep -rn "ticket link\|dso ticket link" plugins/dso/ CLAUDE.md --include="*.md" --include="*.sh" | grep -v "test-" | grep -v ".test-" | sort
   ```

2. For each file found, check:
   - Does it use an unsupported relation (anything other than `blocks`, `depends_on`, `relates_to`)?
   - Does it describe `ticket link` behavior in a way inconsistent with hierarchy enforcement (e.g., implying task→parent links are valid)?
   - Does it need a note that cross-boundary links are promoted?

3. Known inconsistency to fix: `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md` — contains `dso ticket link <child-story-id> <epic-id> child_of` where `child_of` is not a valid relation. Fix to use `depends_on` or add a comment that parent-child relationships are set via `--parent` at creation time, not via `ticket link`.

4. For skill files, agent docs, and workflow prompts: a brief note "hierarchy enforcement applies — cross-boundary links are promoted to ancestor level" is sufficient; do not replicate the full table.

5. Update only files where the content is genuinely inconsistent or misleading. Do not add hierarchy enforcement notes to every mention of `ticket link` — only where the existing text contradicts or ignores the new behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Audit script runs and no files use `child_of` or other invalid relations with `ticket link`
  Verify: ! grep -rn "ticket link.*child_of\|dso ticket link.*child_of" plugins/dso/ CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null
- [ ] `ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md` no longer uses `child_of` relation (if it exists)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'child_of' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md 2>/dev/null || echo "file not found - ok"
- [ ] No file uses unsupported relations (verify only blocks/depends_on/relates_to are used)
  Verify: ! grep -rn "ticket link" plugins/dso/ CLAUDE.md --include="*.md" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "blocks\|depends_on\|relates_to\|#\|--" | grep -v "^[^:]*:[^:]*:#"
- [ ] Audit log comment added to this ticket documenting which files were checked and which (if any) were updated
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show d80c-dd3d | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert any('audit' in c.get('body','').lower() for c in d.get('comments',[])), 'No audit log comment found'"
